failures.description: The agent selected the higher-priced smartphone as the cheapest despite the tool result showing item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper than item 1507389580 at $1157.86.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer the cheapest available Smartphone using ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool output at index 3 clearly returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99 and item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item 1507389580 at $1157.86 was the cheapest, which directly contradicts the tool output. This is not an invalid invocation, underspecification, or unsupported intent; the needed evidence was available and the error came from reasoning over the tool result.
